category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Philippines BPS ICC, DOE energy label, MEPS, and PNS safety requirements.

title.en: China-to-Philippines Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入菲律宾：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入菲律賓：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Philippine market-access requirements: BPS Import Commodity Clearance (ICC), PNS IEC 60335-2-24 electrical safety, DOE energy label, Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS), and R-600a refrigerant handling.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与菲律宾市场准入要求差距对照：BPS进口商品检验放行（ICC）、PNS IEC 60335-2-24电气安全、DOE能效标签、最低能效标准（MEPS）及R-600a制冷剂处理。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與菲律賓市場准入要求差距對照：BPS進口商品檢驗放行（ICC）、PNS IEC 60335-2-24電氣安全、DOE能效標籤、最低能效標準（MEPS）及R-600a製冷劑處理。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment body determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Philippine technical regulations, PNS standards, BPS ICC procedures, DOE energy labelling and MEPS thresholds, and refrigerant provisions with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行菲律宾技术法规、PNS标准、BPS ICC程序、DOE能效标签及MEPS门槛值以及制冷剂条款。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行菲律賓技術法規、PNS標準、BPS ICC程序、DOE能效標籤及MEPS門檻值以及製冷劑條款。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face four major Philippine compliance gaps: (1) electrical safety re-testing to PNS IEC 60335-2-24 — China CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not accepted by BPS; (2) BPS Import Commodity Clearance (ICC) must be secured through a Philippine importer before customs release — there is no CCC reciprocity; (3) DOE energy testing against Philippine MEPS plus the DOE Energy Label, recalculated from China GB 12021.2 grades which do not transfer; and (4) the 230 V 60 Hz Philippine grid differs from China 220/380 V 50 Hz, so motor, compressor, and rating-plate verification is required. R-600a refrigerant is accepted, but charge documentation against PNS IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant provisions must be verified.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四大菲律宾合规差距：（1）依据PNS IEC 60335-2-24重新进行电气安全检测——中国CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被BPS接受；（2）须经菲律宾进口商在海关放行前取得BPS进口商品检验放行（ICC）——不存在CCC互认；（3）依据菲律宾MEPS进行DOE能效检测并加贴DOE能效标签，须从不可转移的中国GB 12021.2等级重新计算；（4）菲律宾230 V 60 Hz电网与中国220/380 V 50 Hz不同，故须核验电机、压缩机及铭牌额定值。R-600a制冷剂被接受，但充注量文件须核实是否符合PNS IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂条款。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四大菲律賓合規差距：（1）依據PNS IEC 60335-2-24重新進行電氣安全檢測——中國CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被BPS接受；（2）須經菲律賓進口商在海關放行前取得BPS進口商品檢驗放行（ICC）——不存在CCC互認；（3）依據菲律賓MEPS進行DOE能效檢測並加貼DOE能效標籤，須從不可轉移的中國GB 12021.2等級重新計算；（4）菲律賓230 V 60 Hz電網與中國220/380 V 50 Hz不同，故須核驗電機、壓縮機及銘牌額定值。R-600a製冷劑被接受，但充注量文件須核實是否符合PNS IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑條款。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly or on material regulatory change (BPS technical regulations, PNS revisions, DOE Department Circulars on MEPS/energy labelling)
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official BPS/DTI, DOE, NTC, or primary Philippine legal sources preferred; local PDFs not accepted.
